data.acceptance:
1. `kno skills install` successfully installs skills from ./.agents/skills directory
2. `kno doctor` correctly detects and reports project-level skills in ./.agents/skills
3. `kno doctor --fix` can initialize or repair the ./.agents/skills directory structure
4. All three commands work correctly when both user-level and project-level skills exist
5. New tests verify project-level skill detection and installation
6. `make sanity` passes with coverage maintained above threshold
